name: Arum Spinosa
description: Slash through enemies with two leaves of the exceedingly rare Arum Spinosa plant. Heavy Attack to whip a flurry of toxic spines at ranged attackers.

patchlogs.name: Orphix Venom: Hotfix 29.6.2
patchlogs.changes: Fixed issues with colour customizations not saving on the Arum Spinosa projectiles.

patchlogs.name: Deimos: Arcana: Prime Vault 29.5.9
patchlogs.changes: Slightly reduced: You only ever need 1 of the Sporothrix and Arum Spinosa Blueprint. Getting all the way to the Arcana Bounties and receiving another Weapon Blueprint is not a feel good moment. Although this doesn’t completely eliminate getting duplicates, the drop % reduction does allow for better chances towards the other rewards.

patchlogs.name: Deimos: Arcana: Hotfix 29.5.3
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the actual base Blueprint for the new Arum Spinosa and Sporothrix not being in Rotation A of Deimos: Arcana Bounties. Arum Spinosa Blueprint is now in Rotation A at 18%, with Sporothrix Blueprint in Rotation A at 21%.

patchlogs.name: Update 29.5: Deimos Arcana
patchlogs.changes:
Slash through enemies with two leaves of the exceedingly rare Arum Spinosa plant. Heavy Attack to whip a flurry of toxic spines at ranged attackers.
*Acquire the Blueprint and Components for the Arum Spinosa from the new Isolation Vault Bounties.
Arum Spinosa
